name: Huadong Medicine Co., Ltd
summary: Huadong Medicine Co., Ltd. produces and sells various pharmaceutical products in China. The company offers Chinese patent drugs, immunosuppressive agents, endocrine drugs, digestive system drugs, antineoplastic drugs, cardiovascular drugs, and antibiotic drugs. Its products include gastrointestinal agents, APIs, and other products. The company also engages in the production and management of traditional Chinese and western raw medicines and preparations, and health care products; sale of biological products as a proxy; wholesale of TCM materials, TCM decoction pieces, chemical preparations, etc.; warehousing and storage business; and research, development, production, and sale of aesthetic medicine products. Huadong Medicine Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
